rationale: Hard pass on adapting this archetype literally — the bus-crash/parking-puzzle hook is mechanically alien to Flip & Dive's jump-aim-splash loop, and the white/red/green palette clashes with the game's signature pink-on-cyan identity. The only transferable element is the broader "fail bait + WHY IS THIS SO HARD" framing, which does map to hypercasual audiences; if we test it, abstract just the text-overlay/fail-loop structure (e.g., diver belly-flops onto concrete, missing the pool) rather than the bus scenario itself. Low confidence cluster anyway (1 creative, 259d old, single advertiser) — not worth prioritizing over fresher fail-bait references.
